title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving from Account linked to the Tenant to Account with pending invite
scenario: Tenant info persists or appears for pending invite account when switching from tenant-linked account in Poly Lens Support screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Log in with Account A that is linked to Tenant A.
4. Tap the Poly Lens Menu (hamburger menu or three-line icon).
9. Log in with Account B that has a pending invite (not yet linked to a tenant).
expected: Step 7: Tenant A name and ID are displayed for the account linked to Tenant A.\nStep 14: Tenant name and ID are NOT displayed for the account with a pending invite (not yet linked to a tenant).
